mapper.insert: INSERT INTO position (department_id, code, name, description, status) VALUES (#{departmentId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.department_id, d.name AS department_name, p.code, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM position p LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = p.department_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.department_id, d.name AS department_name, p.code, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM position p LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = p.department_id ORDER BY p.id
mapper.update: UPDATE position SET department_id = #{departmentId}, code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM position WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
